name: checkout: cleaner dispatch is scoped to the checking-out guest's property — a second property's cleaners, and unassigned cleaners, are NOT notified (B11)
comment: B11: WS_Cleaners.Assigned Property links a cleaner to a WS_Properties row; checkout dispatch must only notify cleaners assigned to THIS property. Three cleaners are seeded, all Active, so the Active filter cannot be what excludes anyone — only property scoping can: Thandi is at property A (recP1, the checkout property), Bongani is at property B (recP2), Sipho is unassigned. Correct behaviour sends exactly two messages — Thandi, then the guest's thanks. If the property filter regresses to the old {Active}=TRUE()-only dispatch, Bongani and Sipho are also messaged and the send count jumps from 2 to 4, failing this fixture. The message arrives on recP1's phone_number_id (the harness default 111000111000), so resolveProperty pins ctx.property to A.

includes: Thank you for staying with us at Villa Liza Guest Lodge
